title: quercus × tingitana
intro: Quercus × tingitana, a hybrid of the Quercus suber and Quercus ilex, is a deciduous tree species native to the Mediterranean region. The bark of Quercus × tingitana contains tannins, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Quercus × tingitana include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, protecting against cell damage and oxidative stress. Quercus × tingitana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
